sub_modules.fft_sign_extend: Combinational sign extension from input precision to internal FFT datapath width.
sub_modules.fft_counter_next: Combinational frame counter next-state and last-sample detection logic.
sub_modules.fft_twiddle_select: Combinational twiddle-factor selector for each FFT stage.
sub_modules.fft_stage_unit: Combinational complex multiply stage used as the radix pipeline arithmetic unit.
sub_modules.fft_complex_addsub: Combinational complex add/subtract helper for butterfly datapaths.
sub_modules.fft_output_select: Combinational output mux for selecting between direct and alternate complex paths.
